prestazioni: F6A (657cc turbocharged DOHC 12V) engine rebuild with forged internals: Tomei 85mm forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from HKS. Upgraded valvetrain with Tomei Type-R camshafts (264° duration, 8.5mm lift) and Supertech titanium retainers.

Garrett GT1549 turbocharger (custom .48 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Trust/GReddy, paired with a Tomei 44mm wastegate and HKS SSQV blow-off valve. Front-mount intercooler kit by GReddy (Type-45) with custom piping and a Koyorad aluminum radiator for cooling.

Haltech Elite 1500 standalone ECU with custom mapping for E85 fuel (flex-fuel compatible), paired with a Link G4+ knock block and AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor. Fuel system upgrades include a Walbro 255lph in-tank pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Sard 60mm fuel pressure regulator.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (Alto Works-specific) with carbon fiber front bumper, overfenders, and ducktail spoiler. Custom widebody conversion with hand-rolled steel fenders to accommodate 15x7 +38 Work Meister S1 3P wheels (185/50R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires).

Recaro SRD-II seats (JDM-spec) with custom bolt-in harness bar by Cusco (Type-3), paired with Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses. Full interior strip with sound deadening removal and a custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, bolt-in, with gusseted joints).

Custom livery by Veilside (inspired by the 1990s JGTC Alto Works race cars) with matte black base, neon green accents, and sponsor decals (HKS, Trust, and Endless). OEM+ headlight restoration with Hella H4 bulbs and custom LED taillights by Jun Auto.
